_comment: Neutral-atom zoned architecture for the 2-bit Cuccaro ADDER at distance-3 surface-code lattice surgery, FULL MERGE (each of the 12 joint-Z measurements is the COMPLETE verified merged-code syndrome: surface3_zz_merge 88 CX / surface3_zzz_merge 131 CX, remapped onto the 5 shared patches). Same circuit as Example/Adder2EndToEnd.lean. Qian Xu zone taxonomy (Xu et al. 2024 Nat.Phys. Fig.1; factoring layout memory+processor+factory+operation-ancilla N_A+reservoir). 108 atoms: 5 surface-code [[13,1,3]] patches = 65 data atoms (MEMORY, 5 patch-rows), 39 reused surgery+syndrome ancillae (OPERATION-ANCILLA N_A), 4 |CCZ> magic atoms for the 4 Toffolis (FACTORY -- used). Storage SLM 0 partitioned into these zones by column band; the ENTANGLING/processor zone (SLMs 1-2) above is where the Rydberg CZ fire. Distances um, durations us.
name: adder2_d3_full_qianxu_zoned_arch
